title: Cleisocentron trichromum
properties: Cleisocentron trichromum, a species in the orchid family, has been found to possess certain therapeutic properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses. Some studies suggest that it may have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever and infections. The plant's bioactive compounds are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects. However, more studies are required to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
constituents: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the active constituents of Cleisocentron trichromum.
